title: Models, Interactions API, Capabilities, Stability, and Provider Ports · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers models, interactions api, capabilities, stability, and provider ports into a changed verified model capability and provider-adapter record. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of verified model capability and provider-adapter record with automated and judgment evidence. Lear…
objectives: Use the Gemini Interactions API for new agent work and document when a legacy generateContent integration must remain during migration.
Discover and record model support for interactions, function calls, structured output, multimodal parts, thinking, streaming, context, and limits.
Separate stable, preview, experimental, deprecated, and retired features and assign migration, fallback, and re-review owners.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Interactions Api Choice
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab agent engineering team handles case 3648 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Interactions Api Choice.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use the gemini interactions api for new agent work and document when a legacy generatecontent integration must remain during migration. For Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Interactions Api Choice, keep Interactions Api Choice connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Provider Adapter
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-provider-adapter-1tytfy" that uses case 8896 to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-provider-adapter-1tytfy
# Competency: agentpy-provider-adapter.
# Case 8896: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_provider_adapter_1tytfy(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1tytfy = "1tytfy-yftyt1-8896"
    assert evidence_variant_1tytfy
    evidence_axes_1tytfy = (
        "authority1tytfy",
        "interaction8896",
        "toolyftyt1",
        "state1tytfy8896",
        "evaluation88961tytfy",
        "recoveryyftyt18896",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1tytfy)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"
